title: FanSafe City Pack
description: Schema for a single city's offline pack. Mirrors the shape currently hardcoded in FanSafe_PWA/index.html's `const cityPacks = [...]` array (index.html around line 1060). This schema is a documented reference for a future runtime extraction (docs/architecture.md, Phase 2) — FanSafe_PWA/index.html does not read from city-packs/*/pack.json today.

flag.description: Flag emoji. Known OS limitation: renders as a two-letter code on some Windows/Chrome combinations (documented in FanSafe_PWA/README.md) — not a data error.

short.description: Short code shown in the UI, e.g. 'CDMX', 'YYZ'.

locale.description: BCP-47-ish locale tag used for speech synthesis, e.g. 'es-MX'.

supportedLanguages.description: Language codes this pack has phrase coverage for. Must match docs/content-governance.md's 'a language claimed must be fully covered' rule.

version.description: Free-text version string, e.g. '2026.03'. Bump on any content change.

updatedAt.description: ISO date this version became current.

reviewByDate.description: Hard date after which this pack must be re-verified before being trusted again (docs/content-governance.md). Not present in the current hardcoded index.html data — a gap to close during Phase 2 runtime extraction, not required here so existing demo data can still validate.

revoked.description: If true, this pack must not be presented as ready-offline until re-reviewed.

reviewStatus.description: Mirrors FanSafe_PWA/index.html's PACK_REVIEW_LABELS vocabulary (added 2026-07-19, Gate 1 session). 'sample' = no official source cited. 'sourced-unreviewed' = an official source was cited but not independently re-checked. 'community-reviewed' = a named second reviewer re-opened the cited sources and recorded a decision in this city's REVIEW.md. Optional here (default 'sample') so packs pending review still validate.

services.description: Optional explicit non-emergency service taxonomy. police_non_emergency must not be used for city or community referral services.
